title: New Calendar brings token releases and market events together
content_html:
A new Calendar in Cryptool brings scheduled token releases and market events together in one place. Instead of tracking dates across several sources, you can see upcoming vesting releases, listings, and other events that may affect the tokens you follow.

The Calendar is available now. You can filter it to the assets you hold and plan around the dates that matter to you.
author: Cryptool
